strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of an open-source GIS platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree in AI; preferred Master's/PhD missing
Limited demonstrated AI/ML product or platform leadership at scale
Current title is Senior/Staff, not Principal/Director-level IC experience
response.justification: Candidate brings broad, hands-on full-stack and infrastructure experience meeting the 15-year minimum, with recent work on AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks plus entrepreneurial founder experience via GISCollective. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms at scale, where the candidate's track record is comparatively light, and cloud/AI strategic advisory experience with large customers is not evident.
